prompt: A full-length editorial fashion photograph of the exact woman in the reference image. Keep her face, hair, body and her red dress faithful to the reference, and keep the dress its true rich RED with the same design — never pink or orange. She is photographed on location standing close to a sun-warmed terracotta and ochre Mediterranean plaster wall with a sprig of olive leaves entering at one edge. Make this ONE cohesive real photograph, fully integrated into the environment — NOT a cut-out pasted on a backdrop. Relight her entirely to match the scene: soft warm late-afternoon open-shade light from camera left, with a gentle long shadow falling to camera right. Cast a realistic grounding contact shadow at her feet plus a natural cast shadow in the scene's light direction so she is truly standing in the space. Let environmental colour bounce softly onto her skin, hair and the edges of the dress. Match perspective, camera height, depth of field, lens character, grain and colour grade between her and the surroundings so they read as a single capture. Light-wrap her edges naturally — no hard halo, no leftover studio background. Vertical full-length portrait, shallow depth of field, natural daylight, premium slow-fashion editorial mood.
